query:
SELECT 
  p.id,
  p.name,
  p.sector,
  p.location,
  p.stage,
  p.priority,
  p.capex_grade AS capexGrade,
  p.owner,
  p.contractors,
  p.matched_business_lines AS matchedBL,
  p.project_key AS projectKey,
  p.created_at AS createdAt,
  p.source
FROM projects p
ORDER BY p.created_at DESC
LIMIT 10;
